description: Add a non-destructive --list-profiles mode to the optional installer.
prompt: Add a non-destructive `--list-profiles` mode to `scripts/apply_harness.py`. When invoked as `python3 scripts/apply_harness.py --list-profiles`, it should print the supported profile names and exit successfully without requiring `--target` and without writing files. Preserve the existing behavior for normal installs, dry runs, `--force`, and `--with-ci`. Add focused coverage in `tests/test_apply_harness.py`. Only edit `scripts/apply_harness.py` and `tests/test_apply_harness.py`.

commands.name: list profiles oracle
